title: Sewing on Paper
excerpt: So excited that our next batch of exclusive hand-stitched tags (made by my crew of wonderful sewers in Los Angeles) have arrived at Two Peas . Each word comes in 2 colors - shop for the tags here . And…
body:
So excited that our next batch of exclusive hand-stitched tags (made by my crew of wonderful sewers in Los Angeles) have arrived at Two Peas.

Each word comes in 2 colors - shop for the tags here. And in a couple weeks, our new Sketchbook line should be arriving as well.

Have you seen all the fantastic new arrivals at Two Peas? There is washi tape galore and all kinds of other good stuff.

Some new layouts for The Girls Loft went up:

*********************************************

Congrats to the winner of Scrapbook Stamper's Workshop giveaway:

~HappyScrappinMama~

said...

I could so use this class. I have so many stamps and no idea how to use them properly. Winning would make me a super duper ~HappyScrappinMama~ (that's my pea name) Thanks for this awesome opportunity!

Thanks to all who entered! Remember, you can still sign up for the class on Two Peas and work at your own pace. It's full of tips and tricks and Jen was sweet enough to ask me to contribute a layout.

**Confession: I might enjoy sewing on paper more than sewing on fabric. At least right now, that is the case. How about you all? Do you have a preference when it comes to sewing?
